message:
test(search-core): add 7 thread-safety tests for TwoTierIndex (br-2tnl.5.10.4)

Add comprehensive concurrency and failure-handling tests:
- TC6: Embedder failure handling (4 tests) - failing fast/quality embedders,
  fallback paths, refinement failure propagation
- TC8: Concurrent read/write (search while adding documents)
- TC8b: High-contention stress test (3 writers + 7 readers)
- TC9: Concurrent searches return deterministic results (10 threads)

All tests use Arc<RwLock<TwoTierIndex>> to verify thread-safety
guarantees at the index level, complementing the OnceLock-based
bridge tests in search_service.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
